title: Flash's Offline Skins
description: Allows users to upload their skins to the server they're playing on.
body:
### Features:
- Users can upload a skin of their choosing to the server they're currently on through Filebin. Initial skin change is automatic, players will have to relog to see further changes. - */offlineskins upload*
- Users can change their skin type (3px or 4px wide arms) - */offlineskins model wide* or *slim*

Note: If Filebin is down or their storage is full, contact your server owner to manually put your skin on the server. Uploads directory is *server_directory/offline_skin_uploads*.
